description_long: This is a large, heavy-duty hammer with a cylindrical, dark metallic head and a long, straight wooden handle. The head is robust and solid, with a smooth, slightly reflective surface and no visible claws or peens, indicating it is a sledgehammer type. The handle is made of wood, featuring a natural brown color and a smooth finish, extending through the center of the head. The hammer's head is attached securely to the handle, with no visible fasteners or additional components. There are no visible markings, logos, or signs of wear on either the head or the handle. The overall design is utilitarian, suitable for heavy striking tasks in urban construction or demolition settings.
description: A heavy sledgehammer with a dark, cylindrical metal head and a long, smooth wooden handle. The hammer appears sturdy and pristine, with no visible markings or damage.
description_view_0: The hammer is seen from the side, showing the full cylindrical head and the straight wooden handle extending downward.
description_view_1: The hammer is viewed from the top, revealing the oval cross-section of the head and the handle centered beneath it.
description_view_2: Another side view, nearly identical to view 0, displaying the cylindrical head and straight handle.
description_view_3: A bottom-up view, similar to view 1, showing the oval end of the head and the handle extending below.
attribute_handle_type: wooden straight handle with a smooth finish and no visible grip enhancements
attribute_head_type: cylindrical sledgehammer head made of steel, with flat striking faces and no claws or peens
